title: SASC Advances 4,194 Military Nominations
description: Today, the Senate Armed Services Committee voted by voice en bloc to report out favorably a list of 4,194 military nominations in the Army, Navy, Air...
text:
Today, the Senate Armed Services Committee voted by voice en bloc to report out favorably a list of 4,194 military nominations in the Army, Navy, Air Force, Marine Corps, and Space Force. This list includes 30 general officer and flag officer promotions.
The nominations were immediately reported to the floor following the Committee’s action.
